args.query:
WITH theme_stats AS (
  SELECT
    theme,
    CASE
      WHEN DATE(p.posted_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-14' AND '2026-04-20' THEN 'previous'
      WHEN DATE(p.posted_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-21' AND '2026-04-27' THEN 'current'
    END as period,
    COUNT(*) as post_count
  FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep, UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
  JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
  WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
    AND theme IN ('product complaints', 'user tutorials', 'competitor mentions')
    AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
    AND DATE(p.posted_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-14' AND '2026-04-27'
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
  theme,
  MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'previous' THEN post_count ELSE 0 END) as previous_posts,
  MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'current' THEN post_count ELSE 0 END) as current_posts,
  CASE
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'previous' THEN post_count ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 100.0
    ELSE ROUND(((MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'current' THEN post_count ELSE 0 END) - MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'previous' THEN post_count ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'previous' THEN post_count ELSE 0 END)), 1)
  END as growth_pct
FROM theme_stats
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY growth_pct DESC

SELECT entity, COUNT(*) as mentions,
  SUM(pe.likes) as total_likes, SUM(pe.views) as total_views
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep, UNNEST(ep.entities) entity
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
LEFT JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.post_engagements` pe ON p.post_id = pe.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.post_id ORDER BY pe.fetched_at DESC) = 1
GROUP BY entity ORDER BY mentions DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT ep.channel_type, COUNT(*) as posts,
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(pe.likes, 0)), 1) as avg_likes,
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(pe.views, 0)), 1) as avg_views
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
LEFT JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.post_engagements` pe ON p.post_id = pe.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.post_id ORDER BY pe.fetched_at DESC) = 1
GROUP BY ep.channel_type ORDER BY posts DESC
